title: Iran's Araghchi: US requesting negotiations because they have not achieved any objectives
body: In a post on published on his Telegram account, Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi said that United States (US) President Donald Trump is requesting negotiations because the US has not achieved any of its objectives.

title: USD/JPY: BoJ caution and intervention risk shape outlook – MUFG
body: MUFG’s FX team highlights that Bank of Japan (BoJ) rate-hike expectations for April have collapsed, even as Japanese inflation data surprise to the upside.

title: BoC: Policy hold view after turnover – Rabobank
body: Rabobank strategists Molly Schwartz and Christian Lawrence expect the Bank of Canada (BoC) to keep its overnight policy rate at 2.25% through year-end, with no change anticipated at the April 29 meeting.

title: USD/CAD: Bearish momentum targets March lows – Scotiabank
body: Scotiabank strategists Shaun Osborne and Eric Theoret observe the Canadian Dollar (CAD) strengthening decisively versus the Dollar, extending its typical April outperformance even as risk sentiment remains uncertain.

title: USD/CAD falls toward six-week lows as US Dollar dips,  Oil lifts CAD
body: USD/CAD declines for a second consecutive day on Monday, trading around 1.3610 at the time of writing, down 0.44% on the day and testing its lowest levels in six weeks.

title: ECB: June hike risk grows on energy shock – Standard Chartered
body: Standard Chartered strategists Christopher Graham and John Davies expect the European Central Bank (ECB) to keep the deposit rate at 2.00% on 30 April, citing a wait‑for‑data stance as the Middle East conflict evolves.

title: Oil: Hormuz risk and higher price path – BNY
body: BNY’s Bob Savage reports that Iran has proposed a U.S. deal prioritizing reopening the Strait of Hormuz and ending the war, with nuclear talks delayed.

title: EUR/GBP: Loses momentum as BoE turns hawkish – MUFG
body: MUFG analysts note that EUR/GBP has drifted lower within a 0.8600–0.8800 range as the Pound (GBP) outperforms the Euro (EUR). The euro-zone faces weaker PMIs and rising stagflation risks, while stronger United Kingdom (UK) data and sticky inflation have markets pricing more BoE tightening.

title: Gold struggles despite softer USD as higher-for-longer interest rate bets weigh
body: Gold (XAU/USD) holds firm at the start of the week as fresh US-Iran headlines improve market sentiment, even after talks over the weekend failed to materialize. At the time of writing, XAU/USD is trading around $4,690, down 0.40% the day after hitting an intraday peak of $4,730.

title: USD: Data-heavy week shapes macro narrative – TD Securities
body: TD Securities strategists Oscar Munoz and Eli Nir outline a busy United States (US) data calendar that will guide US Dollar (USD) traders, including Gross Domestic Product (GDP), Personal Consumption Expenditures (PCE) Price Index inflation, ISM manufacturing and consumer confidence.

title: GBP/JPY slips as UK political risk pressures Pound, Yen weakness limits losses
body: GBP/JPY gives back part of its earlier gains on Monday as the British Pound (GBP) comes under pressure following reports that UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer will face a parliamentary vote on a possible probe into whether he misled lawmakers over the appointment of Peter Mandelson as ambassador to th

title: Fed: One more cut still expected – Rabobank
body: Rabobank strategists reiterate its view that the Federal Reserve (Fed) is likely to cut rates again this year, even as United States (US) Treasury yields edge higher on persistent inflation concerns.

title: USD/CAD Price Forecast: Bears retain control amid Iran jitters, ahead of BoC/Fed
body: The USD/CAD pair is seen extending its retracement from the 1.3715 resistance, or over a one-week set on Friday, and drifting lower for the second consecutive day.

title: AI could quickly become the Fed’s new problem
body: A strong economy and a flimsy labor market don’t typically go hand in hand. For the Fed and other central banks, the playbook has long been straightforward: weak hiring calls for lower interest rates, while an overheating economy and inflation above target justify tighter policy.

title: Gold Price Forecast: XAU/USD extends range play around $4,700, kicking off a Big week
body: Gold finds fresh demand to retake the $4,700 level in Asia on Monday, as the US Dollar pauses its advance amid a recovery in risk sentiment and ahead of the key Federal Reserve (Fed) monetary policy decision due later this week.

title: EUR/USD Weekly Forecast: War and central banks in the limelight
body: The EUR/USD pair ended a three-week winning streak and settled below the 1.1700 mark as the US Dollar (USD) strengthened amid Middle East uncertainty.

title: US Dollar Weekly: Will Kevin Warsh please President Trump?
body: United States President Donald Trump’s nominee to succeed Jerome Powell as Federal Reserve Chair, Kevin Warsh, faced senators, and there was no subtlety.

title: GBP/USD Price Forecast: Bulls seem hesitant as US-Iran tensions counter Fed-BoE divergence
body: The GBP/USD pair edges higher during the first half of the European session on Friday and recovers a part of the previous day's losses to levels just below mid-1.3400s, or a nearly two-week trough.

title: Gold Price Forecast: XAU/USD eyes weekly loss as bears tighten grip
body: Gold is testing the $4,700 level early Friday, holding at its weakest level in over a week and eyeing the first weekly drop in five weeks.

title: Silver Price Forecast: XAG/USD could retest recent lows at $61
body: Silver came under selling pressure in the second half of Thursday, as risk aversion fueled US Dollar (USD) demand.

title: Lightning strikes in Bangladesh kill 14 - including 10-year-old boy
body: A 10-year-old boy is reported to have been killed in lightning strikes which left at least 14 people dead in Bangladesh.

title: Kim Jong Un speaks at memorial for North Korean soldiers killed fighting for Russia
body: Kim Jong Un threw dirt over the remains of one dead soldier at the opening of a memorial museum for his compatriots who died fighting alongside Russia in the Ukraine war.

title: Worker killed at Zaporizhzhia nuclear plant after drone strike, says Russia
body: A worker at the Zaporizhzhia nuclear power ​station has been killed in a ​Ukrainian drone attack, according to Russian ​forces, which control the plant.

title: What we know about suspected gunman at Trump dinner
body: The suspect who stormed through a security checkpoint and shot a Secret Service agent at the White House correspondents' dinner in Washington DC was armed with multiple weapons and knives, police say.

title: Benjamin Netanyahu's biggest rivals merge in bid to oust his government
body: Two of Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu's biggest rivals have announced they are joining forces to attempt to oust his coalition government.
